# Template Agent

## Purpose

Use this agent as a starting point for a new specialized Copilot agent.

## Responsibilities

- Define a narrow role
- State the expected output clearly
- Keep instructions short and action-oriented
- Only include tools that are actually needed

## Example Usage

- Adapt this file when you need a new agent for a specific workflow
- Replace the role, scope, and tool list for your project
